class super::newname(
  $param1 = 42,
  $param2 = 69
){}
class super::childclass(
  $param1 = 42,
  $param2 = 69
) inherits super::newname {}
class super::childclass::other(
  $param1 = 42,
  $param2 = 69
) inherits Super::Newname {}

include super::newname, Class[super::newname], 'super::newname'
require super::newname, Class[super::newname], 'super::newname'
contain super::newname, Class[super::newname], 'super::newname'
hiera_include super::newname, Class[super::newname], 'super::newname'

class{
  super::newname:
    param1 => 123,
    param2 => 123
  ;
  'super::newname':
    param1 => 123,
    param2 => 123
  ;
}

notice $super::newname::param2
